'''magumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foaling|foaling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foaling|foaling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| magumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægimith|mægimith]] || [[word:mægimij|mægimij]] || [[word:mægimish|mægimish]] || [[word:mægimi|mægimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:magugumuth|magugumuth]] || [[word:magugumuj|magugumuj]] || [[word:magugumush|magugumush]] || [[word:magugumu|magugumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:magumuth|magumuth]] || [[word:magumuj|magumuj]] || [[word:magumush|magumush]] || [[word:magumu|magumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magufmuth|magufmuth]] || [[word:magufmuj|magufmuj]] || [[word:magufmush|magufmush]] || [[word:magufmuf|magufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:magumuthu|magumuthu]] || [[word:magumuju|magumuju]] || [[word:magumushu|magumushu]] || [[word:magumuku|magumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:magumuth|magumuth]] || [[word:magumuj|magumuj]] || [[word:magumush|magumush]] || [[word:magumu|magumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:magumuthul|magumuthul]] || [[word:magumujul|magumujul]] || [[word:magumushul|magumushul]] || [[word:magumukul|magumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:magumuthuthu|magumuthuthu]] || [[word:magumujuju|magumujuju]] || [[word:magumushushu|magumushushu]] || [[word:magumuku|magumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:magumuthun|magumuthun]] || [[word:magumujun|magumujun]] || [[word:magumushun|magumushun]] || [[word:magumukun|magumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:magumuthuoro|magumuthuoro]] || [[word:magumujuoro|magumujuoro]] || [[word:magumushuoro|magumushuoro]] || [[word:magumukuoro|magumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
